ab: ci Asing ku ngangan ni ama aku.
ci Ipay ku ngangan ni ina aku.
cacay a bataan ku mihcaan aku ayza.
cacay ku kakama aku, ci Kulas ku ngangan, sabaw cacay ku mihcaan niza ayza.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Kulas，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is kulas, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.
Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: manamuh kaku mingaduy, yu pihibangan sa, maladay amin kami u lalabu nu luma’ tayza mingaduy.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: manamuh kaku tu baluhayay a cabay, ngay a maladay kami mudadiw atu mingaduy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
